---
title: "Gnanesh Reddy"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gnaneshreddy16
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/gnaneshreddy16-tech
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:gnanesh.reddy2@mail.dcu.ie
---

## Welcome

I'm a Business Analytics postgraduate student at **Dublin City University**, passionate about transforming raw data into actionable business insights. My work sits at the intersection of financial data, statistical modelling, and clear communication.

## What I Do

I work with Python, SQL, and data visualisation tools to analyse complex datasets — from stock market trends to sales performance — and present findings that drive real decisions.

## Currently

- 📚 MSc Business Analytics — Dublin City University
- 📊 Building data pipelines and interactive dashboards
- 🔍 Exploring financial analytics and forecasting models

::: {.callout-note}
## Open to Opportunities
I am actively looking for data analyst and business intelligence roles. Feel free to [reach out](contact.qmd).
:::
